name: Catnight
short_description: 😼Being a cat is sometimes so frustrating! Just grab a gun and shoot some furballs. Catnight is an online shooting multiplayer game with many surprising modes. No game will ever be the same. Team up or not it's your choice. Just smashcat your opponents!
detailed_description:
😼Wake up Kitty, you have cats to shoot😼
Catnight is an online multiplayer game that will heat up any meeting with friends. You will not only fight with your opponents and the enormous amount of furry bullets in the air, but you will also need to survive special gameplay circumstances, which will make every match more dynamic and funnier. Don’t forget to team up. It will double the fun.

😼Team time😼
From now on you will never be alone. Team up with your friends and crush the opponents together. Take over the beacons to destroy the enemy's core.

😼Player vs Environment😼
Level up and acquire new skills to survive hordes of enemies. You can fight for victory alone, but it's more fun in a team.

😼Online Multiplayer 😼
We know that the best moments are those, that you spend with your amazing friends, so now you have a chance to have fun with them even if they are far away.

😼So much fun😼
You are fed up with the puffed-up TPP games? Then Catnight is just for you. You will find overwhelming joy in this game. Only the rivalry during the matches will be serious. Are you still reading this? Just fasten your seat belts and arm yourself with kitties.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
